name: Allen Park
description: Come play pickleball at Allen Park in Crestview, FL! There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The court is free.

name: AW Reber
description: Come play pickleball at AW Reber in Baker, FL! There is 1 outdoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The facility includes amenities like water, restrooms, and lights. The court is private.

name: Baker Recreational Center
description: Come play pickleball at Baker Recreational Center in Baker, FL! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Blackwater Golf Club
description: Blackwater Golf Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Crestview, FL. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to food and restrooms.

name: Bluewater Bay/ECT Pickleball
description: Come play pickleball at Bluewater Bay/ECT Pickleball in Niceville, FL! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Buck Destin Park
description: Buck Destin Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Destin, FL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Crestview High School
description: Crestview High School is a place to play pickleball in Crestview, FL. There are 10 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Destin Community Center
description: Destin Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Destin, FL. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts can be reserved. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Destin United Methodist Church
description: This court is only open during the fall when the snowbirds are here ￼

name: Eglin AFB
description: Lights can be turned on for2 hours at a time. To add another 2 hours of court lights, the player can just press the button near the court sidewalk to reset another 2 hours

name: Ferry Park
description: Ferry Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Walton Beach, FL. There are 5 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Fort Walton Beach Tennis Center
description: Fort Walton Beach Tennis Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fort Walton Beach, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, water, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play. The courts can be reserved.
hours: Monday – Friday 8am-12noon 2pm-8pm Saturday & Sunday 8am – dusk Tennis Shop Hours: Monday – Friday 8am-12am 2pm-8pm Saturday 8am-1pm Sunday Closed Shop Phone: 850-344-0230 Find Out More Follow us @fwbtennsctr Powered by Curator.io Sign up for news and updates Sign Up Today! name: Ft Walton Beach Rec Center
description:
This facility is a basketball gymnasium that is marked for pickleball --  3 courts (and other sports).  It is a wooden gym floor.
It does not have food and drink service.
There are 3 nets that can be used, provided by the City.
Days of play are generally Monday Wednesday and Friday, 9 am until noon.
Presently there is play on Tuesday from 10 am until 1 pm.
All times are Central.

name: Hidden Dunes Beach & Tennis Resort
description:

name: Jet Drive Park
description: Come play pickleball at Jet Drive Park in Fort Walton Beach, FL! There are 6 outdoor hard and clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Marion Ruckel Recreational Facility
description: Marion Ruckel Recreational Facility is a place to play pickleball in Valparaiso, FL. There are 3 outdoor hard and asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Meigs Park
description: Meigs Park is a place to play pickleball in Niceville, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Mooney Park
description: Mooney Park is a place to play pickleball in Fort Walton Beach, FL. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and lights.
open_play_schedule: Open play daily 8 am - 11 am, 4pm - 7 pm

name: Niceville Senior Center
description: Niceville Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Niceville, FL. There are 5 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like water and lights. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Pickleball at the Palms
description: Pickleball at the Palms is a place to play pickleball in Fort Walton Beach, FL. There is 1 indoor hard court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. Reservations are available. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and wheelchair accessibility. The court is private.

name: Twin Hills Park
description: Twin Hills Park is a place to play pickleball in Crestview, FL. There are 8 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Wood Foot Brewing Company
description: Unique play with great food
